creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Ditto Graham's question, also: please confirm what modules get loaded in loader. To see this more easily, you can drop to the loader prompt (3) and issue a `boot-conf`, then interrupt autoboot to record what's there before issuing a `boot`.

The last comment was over a year ago, so I'm going to go ahead and close this with "not enough information," but please feel free to re-open/respond if this makes it to you and the issue is still relevant.
